result_schema.title: direction
result_schema.guid_formula:
IF(
  [geo_3c6c] = 'Дубай Eng' OR [geo_3c6c] = 'Таиланд Eng' OR [geo_3c6c] = 'Москва Eng',
  'eng',
  'ru'
)
result_schema.formula:
IF(
  [geo] = 'Дубай Eng' OR [geo] = 'Таиланд Eng' OR [geo] = 'Москва Eng',
  'eng',
  'ru'
)

result_schema.title: contact
result_schema.guid_formula:
IF [phone_0f21] IS NOT NULL THEN
    STR([phone_0f21])
ELSEIF [telegram_id_927a] IS NOT NULL THEN
    STR([telegram_id_927a])
ELSEIF [telegram_username_7uev] IS NOT NULL THEN
    [telegram_username_7uev]
ELSEIF [instagram_9pai] IS NOT NULL THEN
    [instagram_9pai]
END
result_schema.formula:
IF [phone] IS NOT NULL THEN
    STR([phone])
ELSEIF [telegram_id] IS NOT NULL THEN
    STR([telegram_id])
ELSEIF [telegram_username] IS NOT NULL THEN
    [telegram_username]
ELSEIF [instagram] IS NOT NULL THEN
    [instagram]
END

parameters.subsql:
/* 1. Отбираем id нужных сделок (только для фильтра) */
WITH need_leads AS (
    SELECT account_id, leads_id
    FROM parent_child_leads
    WHERE creation_date >= DATE '2025-01-01'
      AND geo = 'ОАЭ'
),

/* 2. Поворачиваем атрибуты (pivot) прямо из amocrm_leads_attributes */
attrs AS (
    SELECT
        a.account_id,
        a.leads_id,

        MAX(CASE WHEN a.name = 'Тип покупателя'          THEN a.value END) AS "Тип покупателя",
        MAX(CASE WHEN a.name = 'Количество спален'       THEN a.value END) AS "Количество спален",
        MAX(CASE WHEN a.name = 'Тип недвижимости'        THEN a.value END) AS "Тип недвижимости",
        MAX(CASE WHEN a.name = 'Срок сдачи'              THEN a.value END) AS "Срок сдачи",
        MAX(CASE WHEN a.name = 'Срок выхода на сделку'   THEN a.value END) AS "Срок выхода на сделку",
        MAX(CASE WHEN a.name = 'ПВ в наличии?'           THEN a.value END) AS "ПВ в наличии?",
        MAX(CASE WHEN a.name = 'Где живёт клиент?'       THEN a.value END) AS "Где живёт клиент?",
        MAX(CASE WHEN a.name = 'Критерий ЛПР/ЛВР'        THEN a.value END) AS "Критерий ЛПР/ЛВР",
        MAX(CASE WHEN a.name = 'Гео клиента'             THEN a.value END) AS "Гео клиента",
        MAX(CASE WHEN a.name = 'Тип недвижимости (Итог)' THEN a.value END) AS "Тип недвижимости (Итог)",
        MAX(CASE WHEN a.name = 'Застройщик'              THEN a.value END) AS "Застройщик"

    FROM amocrm_leads_attributes a
    JOIN need_leads nl          -- только те лиды, что попали в первоначальный фильтр
      ON nl.account_id = a.account_id
     AND nl.leads_id   = a.leads_id
    GROUP BY a.account_id, a.leads_id
)

/* 3. Финальный вывод */
SELECT *
FROM attrs
ORDER BY account_id, leads_id

/* --------- Daily spend by geo & source (USD) --------- */
WITH
/* === Курс USD === */
usd_rate AS (
    SELECT DATE(g.full_date) AS day,
           cf.rate           AS usd_rate
    FROM currency_items_facts cf
    JOIN currency_items      c  ON cf.items_id = c.id
    JOIN general_dates       g  ON g.id       = cf.dates_id
    WHERE c.alphabetic_code = 'USD'
),

/* === Расходы Zakupka === */
costs_processed AS (
    SELECT
        z.date,
        LOWER(TRIM(unnest(string_to_array(z.city, '+'))))                           AS geo_key,
        SUM(z.cost / GREATEST(array_length(string_to_array(z.city, '+'), 1), 1)
           / NULLIF(COALESCE(ur.usd_rate, 0), 0))                                   AS daily_cost_usd
    FROM zakupki z
    LEFT JOIN usd_rate ur ON z.date = ur.day
    WHERE z.cost IS NOT NULL
      AND z.date IS NOT NULL
      AND z.city IS NOT NULL AND z.city <> ''
    GROUP BY z.date, LOWER(TRIM(unnest(string_to_array(z.city, '+'))))
),

/* === Карта geo → pipeline (для единых названий geo) === */
geo_pipeline_map AS (
    SELECT LOWER(TRIM('ОАЭ'))         AS geo_key, TRIM('ОАЭ')         AS geo_display UNION ALL
    SELECT LOWER(TRIM('Бали')),               TRIM('Бали')                   UNION ALL
    SELECT LOWER(TRIM('Таиланд')),            TRIM('Таиланд')                UNION ALL
    SELECT LOWER(TRIM('Москва')),             TRIM('Москва')                 UNION ALL
    SELECT LOWER(TRIM('СПб')),                TRIM('СПб')                    UNION ALL
    SELECT LOWER(TRIM('Сочи')),               TRIM('Сочи')                   UNION ALL
    SELECT LOWER(TRIM('Грузия')),             TRIM('Грузия')                 UNION ALL
    SELECT LOWER(TRIM('Кипр')),               TRIM('Кипр')                   UNION ALL
    SELECT LOWER(TRIM('Таиланд Eng')),        TRIM('Таиланд Eng')            UNION ALL
    SELECT LOWER(TRIM('Москва Элитная')),     TRIM('Москва Элитная')         UNION ALL
    SELECT LOWER(TRIM('Турция')),             TRIM('Турция')
),

/* === Facebook Ads === */
fb_costs_raw AS (
    SELECT
        date,
        campaign_name,
        spend,
        CASE
            WHEN campaign_name ILIKE '%грузия%'  OR campaign_name ILIKE '%georgia%'  THEN 'Грузия'
            WHEN campaign_name ILIKE '%оаэ%'     OR campaign_name ILIKE '%uae%'      THEN 'ОАЭ'
            WHEN campaign_name ILIKE '%таи%'     OR campaign_name ILIKE '%thailand%' THEN 'Таиланд'
            WHEN campaign_name ILIKE '%бали%'    OR campaign_name ILIKE '%bali%'     THEN 'Бали'
            WHEN campaign_name ILIKE '%москва%'                                      THEN 'Москва'
            WHEN campaign_name ILIKE '%питер%'                                       THEN 'СПб'
            WHEN campaign_name ILIKE '%сочи%'                                        THEN 'Сочи'
            WHEN campaign_name ILIKE '%кипр%'                                        THEN 'Кипр'
            WHEN campaign_name ILIKE '%турция%'                                      THEN 'Турция'
        END AS extracted_geo
    FROM fb_cost
),
fb_costs_processed AS (
    SELECT
        date,
        LOWER(extracted_geo)               AS geo_key,
        SUM(spend) / 3.67                  AS daily_cost_usd      -- AED → USD
    FROM fb_costs_raw
    WHERE extracted_geo IS NOT NULL
      AND spend IS NOT NULL AND spend <> 0
    GROUP BY date, LOWER(extracted_geo)
),

/* === Google Ads === */
google_costs_raw AS (
    SELECT
        simple_date::date                 AS date,
        campaign_name,
        ROUND(cost_micros / 1e6, 2)       AS spend,
        CASE
            WHEN campaign_name ILIKE '%грузия%'  OR campaign_name ILIKE '%georgia%'     THEN 'Грузия'
            WHEN campaign_name ILIKE '%оаэ%'     OR campaign_name ILIKE '%uae%'         THEN 'ОАЭ'
            WHEN campaign_name ILIKE '%таи%'     OR campaign_name ILIKE '%thai%' OR campaign_name ILIKE '%thailand%' THEN 'Таиланд'
            WHEN campaign_name ILIKE '%бали%'    OR campaign_name ILIKE '%bali%'        THEN 'Бали'
            WHEN campaign_name ILIKE '%москва%'                                          THEN 'Москва'
            WHEN campaign_name ILIKE '%питер%'                                           THEN 'СПб'
            WHEN campaign_name ILIKE '%сочи%'                                            THEN 'Сочи'
            WHEN campaign_name ILIKE '%кипр%'                                            THEN 'Кипр'
            WHEN campaign_name ILIKE '%турция%' OR campaign_name ILIKE '%turkey%'        THEN 'Турция'
        END AS extracted_geo
    FROM ads_report_83422
),
google_costs_processed AS (
    SELECT
        date,
        LOWER(extracted_geo)              AS geo_key,
        SUM(spend)                        AS daily_cost_usd      -- исходно USD
    FROM google_costs_raw
    WHERE extracted_geo IS NOT NULL
      AND spend IS NOT NULL AND spend <> 0
    GROUP BY date, LOWER(extracted_geo)
)

/* -------- Финальный датасет -------- */
SELECT
    s.date          AS event_date,
    s.geo_display   AS geo,
    s.utmsource,
    s.cost_usd
FROM (
    /* Zakupka */
    SELECT
        cp.date,
        gpm.geo_display,
        'zakupka'                    AS utmsource,
        cp.daily_cost_usd            AS cost_usd
    FROM costs_processed cp
    JOIN geo_pipeline_map gpm ON cp.geo_key = gpm.geo_key

    UNION ALL

    /* Facebook */
    SELECT
        fbp.date,
        gpm.geo_display,
        'fb'                   AS utmsource,
        fbp.daily_cost_usd           AS cost_usd
    FROM fb_costs_processed fbp
    JOIN geo_pipeline_map gpm ON fbp.geo_key = gpm.geo_key

    UNION ALL

    /* Google Ads */
    SELECT
        ggp.date,
        gpm.geo_display,
        'google'                     AS utmsource,
        ggp.daily_cost_usd           AS cost_usd
    FROM google_costs_processed ggp
    JOIN geo_pipeline_map gpm ON ggp.geo_key = gpm.geo_key
) s
ORDER BY event_date DESC, geo, utmsource

SELECT * FROM (
/* 1. Отбираем id нужных сделок (только для фильтра) */
WITH need_leads AS (
    SELECT account_id, leads_id
    FROM parent_child_leads
    WHERE creation_date >= DATE '2025-01-01'
      AND geo = 'ОАЭ'
),

/* 2. Поворачиваем атрибуты (pivot) прямо из amocrm_leads_attributes */
attrs AS (
    SELECT
        a.account_id,
        a.leads_id,

        MAX(CASE WHEN a.name = 'Тип покупателя'          THEN a.value END) AS "Тип покупателя",
        MAX(CASE WHEN a.name = 'Количество спален'       THEN a.value END) AS "Количество спален",
        MAX(CASE WHEN a.name = 'Тип недвижимости'        THEN a.value END) AS "Тип недвижимости",
        MAX(CASE WHEN a.name = 'Срок сдачи'              THEN a.value END) AS "Срок сдачи",
        MAX(CASE WHEN a.name = 'Срок выхода на сделку'   THEN a.value END) AS "Срок выхода на сделку",
        MAX(CASE WHEN a.name = 'ПВ в наличии?'           THEN a.value END) AS "ПВ в наличии?",
        MAX(CASE WHEN a.name = 'Где живёт клиент?'       THEN a.value END) AS "Где живёт клиент?",
        MAX(CASE WHEN a.name = 'Критерий ЛПР/ЛВР'        THEN a.value END) AS "Критерий ЛПР/ЛВР",
        MAX(CASE WHEN a.name = 'Гео клиента'             THEN a.value END) AS "Гео клиента",
        MAX(CASE WHEN a.name = 'Тип недвижимости (Итог)' THEN a.value END) AS "Тип недвижимости (Итог)",
        MAX(CASE WHEN a.name = 'Застройщик'              THEN a.value END) AS "Застройщик"

    FROM amocrm_leads_attributes a
    JOIN need_leads nl          -- только те лиды, что попали в первоначальный фильтр
      ON nl.account_id = a.account_id
     AND nl.leads_id   = a.leads_id
    GROUP BY a.account_id, a.leads_id
)

/* 3. Финальный вывод */
SELECT *
FROM attrs
ORDER BY account_id, leads_id
) AS source

SELECT * FROM (
/* --------- Daily spend by geo & source (USD) --------- */
WITH
/* === Курс USD === */
usd_rate AS (
    SELECT DATE(g.full_date) AS day,
           cf.rate           AS usd_rate
    FROM currency_items_facts cf
    JOIN currency_items      c  ON cf.items_id = c.id
    JOIN general_dates       g  ON g.id       = cf.dates_id
    WHERE c.alphabetic_code = 'USD'
),

/* === Расходы Zakupka === */
costs_processed AS (
    SELECT
        z.date,
        LOWER(TRIM(unnest(string_to_array(z.city, '+'))))                           AS geo_key,
        SUM(z.cost / GREATEST(array_length(string_to_array(z.city, '+'), 1), 1)
           / NULLIF(COALESCE(ur.usd_rate, 0), 0))                                   AS daily_cost_usd
    FROM zakupki z
    LEFT JOIN usd_rate ur ON z.date = ur.day
    WHERE z.cost IS NOT NULL
      AND z.date IS NOT NULL
      AND z.city IS NOT NULL AND z.city <> ''
    GROUP BY z.date, LOWER(TRIM(unnest(string_to_array(z.city, '+'))))
),

/* === Карта geo → pipeline (для единых названий geo) === */
geo_pipeline_map AS (
    SELECT LOWER(TRIM('ОАЭ'))         AS geo_key, TRIM('ОАЭ')         AS geo_display UNION ALL
    SELECT LOWER(TRIM('Бали')),               TRIM('Бали')                   UNION ALL
    SELECT LOWER(TRIM('Таиланд')),            TRIM('Таиланд')                UNION ALL
    SELECT LOWER(TRIM('Москва')),             TRIM('Москва')                 UNION ALL
    SELECT LOWER(TRIM('СПб')),                TRIM('СПб')                    UNION ALL
    SELECT LOWER(TRIM('Сочи')),               TRIM('Сочи')                   UNION ALL
    SELECT LOWER(TRIM('Грузия')),             TRIM('Грузия')                 UNION ALL
    SELECT LOWER(TRIM('Кипр')),               TRIM('Кипр')                   UNION ALL
    SELECT LOWER(TRIM('Таиланд Eng')),        TRIM('Таиланд Eng')            UNION ALL
    SELECT LOWER(TRIM('Москва Элитная')),     TRIM('Москва Элитная')         UNION ALL
    SELECT LOWER(TRIM('Турция')),             TRIM('Турция')
),

/* === Facebook Ads === */
fb_costs_raw AS (
    SELECT
        date,
        campaign_name,
        spend,
        CASE
            WHEN campaign_name ILIKE '%грузия%'  OR campaign_name ILIKE '%georgia%'  THEN 'Грузия'
            WHEN campaign_name ILIKE '%оаэ%'     OR campaign_name ILIKE '%uae%'      THEN 'ОАЭ'
            WHEN campaign_name ILIKE '%таи%'     OR campaign_name ILIKE '%thailand%' THEN 'Таиланд'
            WHEN campaign_name ILIKE '%бали%'    OR campaign_name ILIKE '%bali%'     THEN 'Бали'
            WHEN campaign_name ILIKE '%москва%'                                      THEN 'Москва'
            WHEN campaign_name ILIKE '%питер%'                                       THEN 'СПб'
            WHEN campaign_name ILIKE '%сочи%'                                        THEN 'Сочи'
            WHEN campaign_name ILIKE '%кипр%'                                        THEN 'Кипр'
            WHEN campaign_name ILIKE '%турция%'                                      THEN 'Турция'
        END AS extracted_geo
    FROM fb_cost
),
fb_costs_processed AS (
    SELECT
        date,
        LOWER(extracted_geo)               AS geo_key,
        SUM(spend) / 3.67                  AS daily_cost_usd      -- AED → USD
    FROM fb_costs_raw
    WHERE extracted_geo IS NOT NULL
      AND spend IS NOT NULL AND spend <> 0
    GROUP BY date, LOWER(extracted_geo)
),

/* === Google Ads === */
google_costs_raw AS (
    SELECT
        simple_date::date                 AS date,
        campaign_name,
        ROUND(cost_micros / 1e6, 2)       AS spend,
        CASE
            WHEN campaign_name ILIKE '%грузия%'  OR campaign_name ILIKE '%georgia%'     THEN 'Грузия'
            WHEN campaign_name ILIKE '%оаэ%'     OR campaign_name ILIKE '%uae%'         THEN 'ОАЭ'
            WHEN campaign_name ILIKE '%таи%'     OR campaign_name ILIKE '%thai%' OR campaign_name ILIKE '%thailand%' THEN 'Таиланд'
            WHEN campaign_name ILIKE '%бали%'    OR campaign_name ILIKE '%bali%'        THEN 'Бали'
            WHEN campaign_name ILIKE '%москва%'                                          THEN 'Москва'
            WHEN campaign_name ILIKE '%питер%'                                           THEN 'СПб'
            WHEN campaign_name ILIKE '%сочи%'                                            THEN 'Сочи'
            WHEN campaign_name ILIKE '%кипр%'                                            THEN 'Кипр'
            WHEN campaign_name ILIKE '%турция%' OR campaign_name ILIKE '%turkey%'        THEN 'Турция'
        END AS extracted_geo
    FROM ads_report_83422
),
google_costs_processed AS (
    SELECT
        date,
        LOWER(extracted_geo)              AS geo_key,
        SUM(spend)                        AS daily_cost_usd      -- исходно USD
    FROM google_costs_raw
    WHERE extracted_geo IS NOT NULL
      AND spend IS NOT NULL AND spend <> 0
    GROUP BY date, LOWER(extracted_geo)
)

/* -------- Финальный датасет -------- */
SELECT
    s.date          AS event_date,
    s.geo_display   AS geo,
    s.utmsource,
    s.cost_usd
FROM (
    /* Zakupka */
    SELECT
        cp.date,
        gpm.geo_display,
        'zakupka'                    AS utmsource,
        cp.daily_cost_usd            AS cost_usd
    FROM costs_processed cp
    JOIN geo_pipeline_map gpm ON cp.geo_key = gpm.geo_key

    UNION ALL

    /* Facebook */
    SELECT
        fbp.date,
        gpm.geo_display,
        'fb'                   AS utmsource,
        fbp.daily_cost_usd           AS cost_usd
    FROM fb_costs_processed fbp
    JOIN geo_pipeline_map gpm ON fbp.geo_key = gpm.geo_key

    UNION ALL

    /* Google Ads */
    SELECT
        ggp.date,
        gpm.geo_display,
        'google'                     AS utmsource,
        ggp.daily_cost_usd           AS cost_usd
    FROM google_costs_processed ggp
    JOIN geo_pipeline_map gpm ON ggp.geo_key = gpm.geo_key
) s
ORDER BY event_date DESC, geo, utmsource
) AS source
